title: Broadway Gondolier
writer: Warren Duff, Sig Herzig, E.Y. Harburg
actors: Dick Powell, Joan Blondell, Adolphe Menjou
plot: Dick Purcell is an American taxi driver who wants to become a singer promoting cheese products. Oddly he thinks the way to do it is to become a gondolier from Venice. Along the way he sings and woos a sassy secretary Alice.
